required_fields.name: merchant_contact_or_address
required_fields.label: 被投诉商家联系方式或地址

optional_fields.name: merchant_unified_social_credit_code
optional_fields.label: 商家统一社会信用代码

derived_placeholders.name: consumer_id_block
derived_placeholders.rule: 有值时渲染为“证件号：...”，无值时置空

derived_placeholders.name: merchant_credit_code_block
derived_placeholders.rule: 有值时渲染为“统一社会信用代码：...”，无值时置空

derived_placeholders.name: legal_basis_or_default
derived_placeholders.rule: 优先使用 legal_basis；缺失时使用模板默认依据段
